name: @chaeco/jwt-permission
description: Framework-agnostic JWT permission middleware for Node.js (Hoa, Koa, Express, etc.)

scripts.build: npm run build:esm && npm run build:cjs
scripts.build:esm: tsc --module esnext --outDir dist/esm --declaration false && echo '{"type":"module"}' > dist/esm/package.json
scripts.build:cjs: tsc --module commonjs --outDir dist/cjs --declaration false && echo '{"type":"commonjs"}' > dist/cjs/package.json && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --declaration --declarationDir dist/types

author: iptodays
